rows.label: qev012102_MSG0001
rows.name: Hah!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012102_MSG0002
rows.name: Uwaaah! Senpai came for me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012102_MSG0003
rows.name:
Uwaaah! I knew I could count
on you! Thanks for saving me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012102_MSG0004
rows.name: Ouch, ouch, ouch...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012102_MSG0005
rows.name:
Sorry. I think I hit my body
pretty hard when I was dropped...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012102_MSG0006
rows.name:
While I was in its mouth, at first I was
just struggling frantically, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012102_MSG0007
rows.name:
Eventually, I suddenly calmed down
and realized: if I attack the glaring
eyeball right in front of me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012102_MSG0008
rows.name:
Maybe it would take damage and
flinch, dropping me in the process![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012102_MSG0009
rows.name:
See! They say no matter how much a
martial artist trains, they can't
train their eyeballs! It's like that![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012102_MSG0010
rows.name:
Being able to make calm
judgments like that... is it
proof I've grown a little bit?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012102_MSG0011
rows.name:
I attacked its eye with my
dagger, shouting "Eiya!"[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012102_MSG0012
rows.name: And it was super effective![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012102_MSG0013
rows.name:
The enemy let out a scream and
released me at the same time...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012102_MSG0014
rows.name: And I went straight down to the ground![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012102_MSG0015
rows.name:
Hmm, I hadn't thought about what would
happen after being released in midair.
I still need more training.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012102_MSG0016
rows.name:
My body not being able to move properly
on its own is the lesson for this time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012102_MSG0017
rows.name:
I'll reflect on it thoroughly
and put it to use next time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012102_MSG0018
rows.name: So, um...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012102_MSG0019
rows.name:
I'm being a burden again, but
could you lend me a shoulder?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012102_MSG0020
rows.name:
I took enough damage that I can't
even stand on my own anymore...
Oh man, how pathetic of me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012102_MSG0021
rows.name: I'm sorry...[ST:wait ]
